execution_boundary.summary: OSCAL represents controls and assessment artifacts rather than executing transitions.

preparation_boundary.summary: OSCAL can document controls around preparation but does not determine preparation consequence.

commitment_boundary.summary: Control evidence may inform commitment review through a StegVerse adapter.

semantic_equivalence_boundary.summary: Control identifiers and profile resolution require normalized interpretation.

unknown_trajectory_boundary.summary: OSCAL does not directly classify unknown runtime trajectories.

authority_boundary.summary: Assessment artifacts do not grant execution authority.

evidence_freshness_boundary.summary: Catalog, profile, implementation, and assessment versions must be current.

reconstruction_boundary.summary: Machine-readable control and assessment records can strengthen reconstruction.

interoperability_path.summary: OSCAL artifacts enter as structured control and assessment evidence.

next_required_action: add source-versioned OSCAL control and assessment fixture
